de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.literal

Class NullLiteral

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Literal
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.literal.NullLiteral
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Expression, ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, SVSubstitute

    public class NullLiteral
extends Literal
    Null literal. Is used as singleton.
